title: Charred Gooey Russian Passata Blini
description: A comforting Russian dish featuring charred passata, a shio-koji cure and a crispy blini. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Combine the warm water, sugar, and yeast in a small bowl. Let it sit for 10 minutes, until frothy.
Mix the flour, salt, and eggs in a large bowl. Add the honey and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes, until elastic and smooth. Let it rise for 1 hour, until doubled in size.
Divide the dough into 6-8 equal pieces and shape into blini. Let them rest for 30 minutes, until slightly puffed.
Heat a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the blini for 2-3 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
In a separate pan, heat the passata over medium heat. Add the shio-koji cure and mix until combined.
Place a cooked blini on a plate, top with a spoonful of charred passata, and serve immediately.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs and a dollop of sour cream if desired.
